# juju_ssh_key (List Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
list "juju_ssh_key" "this" {
  provider         = juju
  include_resource = true

  config {
    model_uuid = "<model-uuid>"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model_uuid` (String) The Juju model UUID.
